svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="出款渠道路由" id="payout-router"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-152" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="880" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="出款渠道路由:责任链 + 优先级(生产无可用渠道直接抛异常)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="440" width="820" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="PayoutChannelRouter
AbstractPayoutChannel 接口" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="320" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PRI" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="路由优先级
① 租户偏好
② 服务商模式·微信
③ 直连·微信
④ 银行卡
⑤ dev/test · MOCK" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="600" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="W1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="WechatPayoutChannel
partner 路径(服务商)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="190" x="80" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="W2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="WechatPayoutChannel
direct 路径(直连)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="190" x="300" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="BankPayoutChannel
银行卡代付" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="170" x="520" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="payout_channel_log
request / response / 状态
每次出款落审计" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="290" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NOTE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="大额 ≥ 2000 元传 RSA-OAEP 加密 user_name
凭证 tenant_wechat_profile(AES-GCM 加密存储)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="400" x="80" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="R" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="W1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="R" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="W2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="R" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="B"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="W1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="L"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="W2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="L"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E6" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="L"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 13px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 出款渠道路由:责任链 + 优先级(生产无可用渠道直接抛异常)
